violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Spoon laying in berries at server station refrigerator.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -2 of the cook line prep tables were found with food temperatures up to 47F. *Facility had a very busy lunch, units were found ~2 degrees cooler before departure. Ensure units continue cooling and return to /maintain foods at 41F or less.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Crumb/debris at bottom shelves throughout kitchen.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Equipment/utensil was not air-dried or allowed adequate draining after sanitizing. -Observed wet dishes stacked together at clean dish storage rack. -Server salad prep table has moisture below cutting board.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Some dust at ceiling tiles near vents. -Odor at dish pit.

General employee practices. — --Employee failed to maintain a high degree of personal cleanliness or observe proper hygienic practices. -Upon entry into kitchen, observed cook eating at the cook line with gloved hands and then handle cell phone with gloved hands. *Redirected immediately.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. - 2 sani buckets found with less than 150ppm quat solution. *Corrected on-site, buckets refreshed immediately.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Door handle is damaged/hanging loose at freezer next to fryers.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Debris/residue at interiors of ovens and drawers on cookline. -Crumb/debris at back edge upper compartment of the mid-line make table.
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
